text: Light travels like a wave...until you watch it. The Double-Slit Experiment reveals how light behaves unpredictably. In one scenario, light creates a pattern. But watch it closely... When observed, it acts like particles, collapsing the wave function. This challenges our understanding of reality. Are we changing what we observe? Curious to learn more? Hit that follow button for more science wonders!
